# jt ↔ alias map (auto-generated)

Regenerate: `python3 tools/jt_aliases.py`. **Do not hand-edit.**

Every JT export `jtN` lives at `CODE seg + 0xOFF`; its CODE-local alias is `lOFF`. This table is the lookup so we stop re-deriving it mid-lift.

- **Alias** = the `lXXXX` name for the same address (segment shown for the `_cNN` collision cases).
- **Defined as** / **line** = the name + line the function is actually defined under in `src/engine/boot.c`. The line is the **forward-decl oracle**: calling `jtX` from above its definition line needs a `static … jtX(…);` first.
- **Status**: ✅ lifted · 🟡 PROBE stub · ⬜ no definition (may be lifted under a different alias, or genuinely absent).

**Totals:** 1208 JT entries — 950 lifted, 69 stub, 189 no-boot.c-def.
